---
title: "Leaflet RevealJS Demo"
author: "Roy Francis"
date: last-modified
leaflet:
  map-basic:
    center: [51.505, -0.09]
    zoom: 13
    height: "400px"
  map-markers:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "400px"
    markers:
      - lat: 59.33
        lon: 18.07
        popup: "<b>Stockholm</b><br>Capital of Sweden"
        tooltip: "Stockholm"
      - lat: 59.35
        lon: 18.10
        popup: "Djurgården"
      - lat: 59.31
        lon: 18.05
        popup: "Södermalm"
  map-markers-tab:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "400px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.tsv"
    markers-sep: "\t"
  map-icons:
    center: [48.86, 2.35]
    zoom: 13
    height: "400px"
    markers:
      - lat: 48.8584
        lon: 2.2945
        popup: "<b>Eiffel Tower</b>"
        icon: "bi-geo-alt-fill"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 28
      - lat: 48.8606
        lon: 2.3376
        popup: "<b>Louvre Museum</b>"
        icon: "bi-building"
        icon-color: "#4a90d9"
        icon-size: 24
      - lat: 48.853
        lon: 2.3499
        popup: "<b>Notre-Dame</b>"
        icon: "bi-pin-map-fill"
        icon-color: "green"
        icon-size: 26
  map-fontawesome:
    center: [41.9028, 12.4964]
    zoom: 13
    height: "400px"
    markers:
      - lat: 41.9028
        lon: 12.4964
        popup: "<b>Roman Forum</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-landmark"
        icon-color: "#b04a2b"
        icon-size: 26
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.4922
        popup: "<b>Colosseum</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-torii-gate"
        icon-color: "#5c6f7b"
        icon-size: 24
      - lat: 41.8986
        lon: 12.4768
        popup: "<b>Piazza Navona</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-tree"
        icon-color: "#2f7d32"
        icon-size: 24
format: 
  revealjs:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.2/css/all.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">
---

## Basic map

```lua
{{{< leaflet map-basic >}}}
```

{{< leaflet map-basic >}}

## Markers

```lua
{{{< leaflet map-markers >}}}
```

{{< leaflet map-markers >}}

## Inline map

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 height="350px" >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[48.86, 2.35]" zoom=14 height="350px" >}}

## Inline map with markers

```lua
{{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="350px" markers='[{"lat":59.33,"lon":18.07,"popup":"<b>Stockholm</b>","tooltip":"Stockholm"},{"lat":59.35,"lon":18.10,"popup":"Djurgården"},{"lat":59.31,"lon":18.05,"popup":"Södermalm"}]' >}}}
```

{{< leaflet center="[59.33, 18.07]" zoom=12 height="350px" markers='[{"lat":59.33,"lon":18.07,"popup":"<b>Stockholm</b>","tooltip":"Stockholm"},{"lat":59.35,"lon":18.10,"popup":"Djurgården"},{"lat":59.31,"lon":18.05,"popup":"Södermalm"}]' >}}

## TSV file approach

Needs Bootstrap CSS styles.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

```yaml
leaflet:
  map-markers-tab:
    center: [59.33, 18.07]
    zoom: 12
    height: "400px"
    markers-file: "data/stockholm-markers.tsv"
    markers-sep: "\t"
format: 
  revealjs:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">
```

```tsv
lat	lon	popup	tooltip	icon	icon-color	icon-size
59.33	18.07	<b>Stockholm</b><br>Capital of Sweden	Stockholm	bi-geo-alt-fill	tomato	28
59.35	18.10	Djurgården	Djurgården	bi-tree	#2f7d32	24
59.31	18.05	Södermalm	Södermalm	bi-pin-map-fill	#4a90d9	26
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

```lua
{{{< leaflet map-markers-tab >}}}
```

{{< leaflet map-markers-tab >}}

:::
:::

## Map icons

Needs Bootstrap CSS styles.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

```yaml
---
leaflet:
  map-icons:
    center: [48.86, 2.35]
    zoom: 13
    height: "400px"
    markers:
      - lat: 48.8584
        lon: 2.2945
        popup: "<b>Eiffel Tower</b>"
        icon: "bi-geo-alt-fill"
        icon-color: "tomato"
        icon-size: 28
      - lat: 48.8606
        lon: 2.3376
        popup: "<b>Louvre Museum</b>"
        icon: "bi-building"
        icon-color: "#4a90d9"
        icon-size: 24
      - lat: 48.853
        lon: 2.3499
        popup: "<b>Notre-Dame</b>"
        icon: "bi-pin-map-fill"
        icon-color: "green"
        icon-size: 26
format: 
  revealjs:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap-icons@1.11.3/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css">
---

{{{< leaflet map-icons >}}}
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

{{< leaflet map-icons >}}

:::
:::

## FontAwesome icons

Needs FontAwesome CSS styles.

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}

```yaml
---
leaflet:
  map-fontawesome:
    center: [41.9028, 12.4964]
    zoom: 13
    height: "400px"
    markers:
      - lat: 41.9028
        lon: 12.4964
        popup: "<b>Roman Forum</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-landmark"
        icon-color: "#b04a2b"
        icon-size: 26
      - lat: 41.89
        lon: 12.4922
        popup: "<b>Colosseum</b>"
        icon: "fa-solid fa-torii-gate"
        icon-color: "#5c6f7b"
        icon-size: 24
format:
  revealjs:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.2/css/all.min.css">
---

{{{< leaflet map-fontawesome >}}}
```

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}

{{< leaflet map-fontawesome >}}

:::
:::

## End of demo

This is the end of the demo.
